steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
To find $f(8)$, replace $x$ with $8$ in the function $f(x)=\frac{1}{2}(x+14)$:
$$f(8)=\frac{1}{2}(8+14)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Add inside the parentheses, then multiply by $\frac{1}{2}$:
$$\frac{1}{2}(8+14)=\frac{1}{2}(22)=11$$
The value of $f(8)$ is $11$. The answer is D.
